mnemonics: ACCEPT Change: Agile Core Concepts Embrace Project Transformation
keyPoints: Agile processes embrace change and deliver software incrementally
The cost of change rises exponentially over time in traditional models but is more manageable in agile
An agile process is iterative, adaptive, and focuses on customer collaboration
commonMistakes: Thinking agile means no planning or documentation
Believing the cost of change curve is the same for all project types
Assuming agile eliminates all change-related costs completely
